input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.1.3
            TITLE: sae logo

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.1.3: SAE Logo
VE.1.3 SAE Logo 
The SAE International Logo must be displayed on the front and/or both sides of the vehicle in 
a prominent location.

final_answer: The SAE International Logo must be displayed on the front and/or both sides of the vehicle in a prominent location.
